data.title: BNB nears $831 support amid $23B Bitcoin options expiration, causing crypto volatility.
data.description: The value of Binance Coin has decreased by 1.15% to $831.05 amidst turbulent market conditions stemming from a significant Bitcoin options expiration. BNB is nearing crucial Bollinger Band support levels, indicating potential volatility in the near future.

data.title: USTR to deliver report to Congress on USMCA extension by January, following hearings and trilateral meeting.
data.description: A report from the USTR regarding the potential extension of USMCA for 16 more years is set to be submitted to Congress by the beginning of January. This comes after three days of hearings took place last week, and a meeting occurred on Friday among leaders from the three nations involved.

data.title: GOP support for Trump's trade policies is dwindling due to cost concerns, according to new POLITICO poll.
data.description: Recent polling data from POLITICO reveals that the backing of President Donald Trump's trade and tariff strategies by Republicans is limited due to financial burdens.

data.title: Trump admin and EU at odds over tariff deal as officials meet in Brussels.
data.description: Senior officials from both the Trump administration and the European Union are meeting in Belgium amidst tensions over the summer tariff deal. Both parties accuse each other of deviating from the agreement, which was aimed at resolving trade disputes. The deal, which was agreed upon by both sides, aimed to address tariffs on various goods, particularly affecting industries such as automobile manufacturing. However, disputes have arisen regarding the implementation and enforcement of the agreement. This meeting is crucial as both parties attempt to navigate their differences and ensure that the terms of the deal are upheld, amid concerns of escalating trade tensions.

data.title: ETH price touches $2,920 support, down 1.2% in holiday trading; technical indicators suggest potential consolidation ahead of year-end.
data.description: The current price of Ethereum is approximately $2,920.01, showing a slight decrease of 1.2% during holiday trading. Technical indicators suggest a potential consolidation phase as we approach the end of the year.

data.title: US-China talks on rare earths continue, aiming to finalize export agreement by Thanksgiving, says Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.
data.description: Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent has expressed optimism about the United States and China reaching a final agreement on rare earth exports by Thanksgiving.

data.title: Dems and union groups criticize Trump for pausing port fees on China-linked ships for a year amid trade talks.
data.description: The decision by the Trump administration to temporarily suspend port fees on ships connected to China has come under scrutiny. This pause in fees will last for a year and is being seen as a tactic in the ongoing trade negotiations between the two countries.

data.title: President Trump's emergency tariff regime aimed at China is under scrutiny ahead of a Supreme Court hearing.
data.description: President Donald Trump has justified his emergency tariffs, asserting their necessity following negotiations with China in anticipation of the Supreme Court's review of his extensive measures later this week.

data.title: Trump secures deals in Asia before meeting Xi; looking forward to a crucial summit on Thursday.
data.description: President Donald Trump is promoting recent agreements made with neighboring countries of China in anticipation of his upcoming meeting with the Chinese leader on Thursday.

data.title: Dow Jones hits record high, Nasdaq recovers losses, Broadcom predicts doubling AI chip sales.
data.description: The Dow Jones and Russell 2000 achieved historic peaks, with the Nasdaq recovering from initial declines. Broadcom anticipates a 100% increase in sales of AI chips. Dow Jones Futures are up, contrasting with falling tech stocks. Broadcom is the latest AI company to be impacted by earnings.

data.title: VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON) included in two global equity indices, enhancing visibility to investors.
data.description: On December 10, 2025, VEON Ltd. was revealed to have been added to two important global equity indices. This development, significant for the digital operator, which is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol VEON, boosts its exposure and appeal to institutional investors worldwide.

data.title: Global display market projected to grow from USD 167.47 billion to USD 261.38 billion by 2035, with 4.13% CAGR. Dig-tech advancements fueling audience engagement.
data.description: Dublin – According to a report on the display market released by ResearchAndMarkets.com, the industry is set to grow significantly, with projections indicating an increase from USD 167.47 billion to USD 261.38 billion by the year 2035. This growth is expected to occur at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.13% during this period. The evolution of digital technology in the display sector has opened up various opportunities for companies to improve audience engagement and explore new markets.

data.title: 4.3% GDP growth exaggerated by historic video game inflation data, affecting economic surge.
data.description: The recent surge in GDP growth, measured at 4.3%, has been partially attributed to historic inflation data from the video game industry. This data has led to an overestimation of the economic growth.

data.title: $23B in Bitcoin options set to expire amid market uncertainty at $87,279.53. JPMorgan considers crypto trading.
data.description: The current trading price of Bitcoin is $87,279.53, showing a 1.1% decrease. This decline comes amidst concerns over potential volatility due to a significant options expiry. Additionally, there is speculation about JPMorgan's potential move towards cryptocurrency, indicating a potential shift in the institutional stance towards digital assets.

data.title: Nvidia secures AI dominance with Groq agreement, stock up. Analysts see as maneuver against Google. Stock climbs on approval.
data.description: NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) took a strategic step on Wednesday to strengthen its position in the AI inference market by signing a non-exclusive licensing agreement with Groq. This move was seen as crucial in the industry, with analysts at Rosenblatt Securities emphasizing its importance to combat competition, especially from Google's tensor processing unit (TPU) and to solidify NVIDIA's leadership as the AI sector shifts focus towards real-time deployment over training large models. Following this development, NVDA stock experienced positive growth, with investors and Wall Street expressing approval of the deal. This move was regarded as significant in maintaining NVIDIA's market dominance.

data.title: Smaller markets outperform major metros as U.S. competitiveness shifts in 2025, according to Area Development and Chmura Economics.
data.description: A recent nationwide study conducted by Area Development and Chmura Economics & Analytics indicates a significant change in the competitiveness landscape of the United States. Smaller and mid-sized markets are demonstrating better performance compared to major metropolitan areas in terms of key metrics critical for corporate expansion. The study, titled 2025 Leading Metro Locations rankings, assessed numerous metropolitan and micropolitan areas across the country utilizing Chmura's data-driven model. This model places equal importance on Prime Workforce and Economic Strength factors. This shift underscores the increasing prominence of smaller and mid-size markets in the realm of corporate expansion, reflecting a trend towards decentralization in business growth strategies.

data.title: Only 5 Sears stores survive as the former retail giant faces almost certain closure.
data.description: The number of remaining Sears stores in the country has dwindled down to just five, marking the impending closure of a once powerful American retail giant.

data.title: Intelligent Living App Group Inc. (Nasdaq: ILAG) announced 1-for-10 share consolidation on Dec. 15, 2025 in Hong Kong.
data.description: In Hong Kong on December 26, 2025, Intelligent Living Application Group Inc. (Nasdaq: ILAG), a top lockset producer and distributor based in Hong Kong, disclosed that on December 15, 2025, it hosted a special event.
